---
title: "People"
description: |
  PhD Students
listing:
  - id: st1
    max-description-length: 500
    image-height: 300px
    fields: [title, description, image, date]
    contents: 
      - people_1
    type: default
    grid-item-border: false
    sort-ui: false
    filter-ui: false

  - id: st2
    max-description-length: 500
    image-height: 200px
    fields: [title, description, image, date]
    contents: 
      - people_2
    type: default
    grid-item-border: false
    sort-ui: false
    sort: "priority asc"
    filter-ui: false
    
  - id: st3
    max-description-length: 500
    image-height: 200px
    fields: [title, description, image, date]
    contents: 
      - people_3
    type: default
    grid-item-border: false
    sort-ui: false
    sort: "priority asc"
    filter-ui: false
---

## Bibiana Terra Dasoler

::: {#st1}
:::


## Talita Menger 

::: {#st2}
:::

## Cumbito 

::: {#st3}
:::
